Notes: Delete an existing RRset and add a new RR of the same owner/type within one UPDATE to probe whether the server applies operations sequentially or normalizes them as a batch.

Steps.Description: Delete the existing helper.campus.edu. A RRset, then add a new A RR for the same owner in the same UPDATE.

Steps.Name: helper.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset is absent or contains the newly added address after the UPDATE.
